name: splice-motion
description: Remotion compositions that render Splice's original cinematic motion assets.

scripts.render: npm run render:lie && npm run render:session && npm run render:doctor
scripts.render:lie: remotion render TheLie ../media/the-lie.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=20 && remotion still TheLie ../media/the-lie-poster.jpg --frame=330
scripts.render:session: remotion render AgentSession ../media/agent-session.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=20 && remotion still AgentSession ../media/agent-session-poster.jpg --frame=330
scripts.render:doctor: remotion render DoctorHandshake ../media/doctor-handshake.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=20 && remotion still DoctorHandshake ../media/doctor-handshake-poster.jpg --frame=370
